---
title: "Worksheet10"
author: "Charles Sandahl"
date: "2026-04-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(MASS)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
```

# Data
```{r}
wineData = read_excel("~/DATA301-01 Variance and Multivariate Analysis/Week 12 - Linear Discriminant Analysis/wine.xlsx")
```

# Question1
```{r}
wineData$Type = as.factor(wineData$Type)
wineModel = lda(Type~.-Type, data = wineData, prior = c(1/3,1/3,1/3))
wineModel$svd
29.95777^2/(29.95777^2+18.22846^2)
18.22846^2/(18.22846^2+29.95777^2)
newWine = data.frame(Alcohol=11, Malic=3, Ash=2.3, Alcalinity=21.5,Magnesium=99, Phenols=2.8, Flavanoids=2.98, Nonflavanoids=0.12, Proanthocyanins=1.87, Color=2.8, Hue=0.9, Dilution=3.3, Proline=520)
predict(object = wineModel, newdata = newWine)
wineResult = predict(wineModel)
winePlotData = data.frame(group = wineData$Type, transcore = wineResult$x)
ggplot(data = winePlotData, aes(x=transcore.LD1, y=transcore.LD2,))+
  geom_point(aes(color=group))
```
